description_long: This rifle features a striking black and neon green striped camouflage pattern across its entire body, including the stock, receiver, handguard, and barrel. The design includes a skeletonized stock for reduced weight and a modern tactical appearance. The barrel is fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, also adorned with the same striped pattern, giving the weapon a distinctive look. The magazine is a detachable box type, seamlessly integrated into the lower receiver. The rifle's overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of modern tactical rifles. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, enhancing the vividness of the green and black coloration.
description: A modern rifle with a black and neon green striped camouflage, skeletonized stock, and suppressor, featuring a detachable box magazine and smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletonized stock, suppressor, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same striped pattern, stock, and magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
